content.en:
"This is Julu City, established by three powerhouses at the peak of the Sixfold Ancestor, and it is also one of the largest trading giant cities in the Shattered Void Realm, and it is very safe to trade here. And in this area, it will also be protected by Julu City, but once you leave, there is no guarantee!"

As the Void White Dao Ancestor spoke, he took Ye Tian into Julu City.

Entering Julu City, Ye Tian sensed a lot of ordinary ancestors, and was a little surprised, but after thinking about it carefully, he understood a little.

Perhaps only the Sixfold Origin Ancestor could enter the Shattered Void Realm Realm, but some Sixfold Origin Ancestors would bring ordinary Origin Ancestors in, and as the endless years passed, some Origin Ancestors stayed here and continued to reproduce their children, so there were still some cultivators in the Shattered Void Realm Realm.

Even if the Shattered Void Realm is not suitable for cultivation, as long as there are resources, cultivation is still not a problem.

Moreover, in the Giant Deer City, this is where you can practice, so many original ancestors gathered here.

However, these ordinary ancestors can only do ordinary work here to earn resources.

"There are so many Sixfold Ancestors!"

Ye Tian was slightly surprised.

With a slight sense, he found thousands of Sixfold Primordial Ancestors, and there were only many Sixfold Primordial Ancestors in the entire Primeval Domain?

However, the primeval realm realm did not even have a half-step sevenfold ancestor, and it was definitely a very weak realm.

After entering Julu City, Xubai Dao Ancestor was separated from Ye Tian, he had his own affairs to deal with, but he would take Ye Tian away when he left.

......

In the following days, Ye Tian kept inquiring about the news of the things he carried.

I have to say that there are really a lot of things in Julu City, and there are also a lot of things that can be carried by condensing the sevenfold Dao fruit and the eightfold Dao fruit.

However, the carrying thing that can condense the Ninefold Dao Fruit is very rare here.

After all, the carrying thing that could condense the Nine Folds Dao Fruit was only useful to the Origin Ancestors who had comprehended the three hundred and sixty-five Extreme Extreme Dao, and it was useless to the other Origin Ancestors.

And how rare is that kind of ancestor who has comprehended the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, even if it really exists, almost all of them are primordial ancestors with strong backgrounds, and there is no shortage of such carrying things.

Therefore, there is almost no market for this kind of carrying thing in Julu City!

However, there is still hope for the acquisition, just have to inquire.

Finally, Ye Tian still heard the news of this kind of carrying thing.

"The Ancient Hell Dao Alliance's Changfeng Dao Ancestor has a carrying thing in his hand - the Hell Stone!"

Ye Tian learned that the Hell Stone was the top-level carrying object, and it could condense the Ninefold Dao Fruit, which was very valuable.

However, the value of the Hellstone is too high, so no ancestor is willing to trade the Hellstone.

After all, it can only condense the half-step six-fold ancestor of the eightfold Dao fruit, and it is enough to use other second-level carrying things, and it is a complete waste to use the Hell Stone!

So, Ye Tian contacted Changfeng Dao Ancestor and wanted to trade the Hell Stone in Changfeng Dao Ancestor's hand.

Soon, Ye Tian saw Changfeng Dao Ancestor.

"Sixfold Ancestor Middle Stage!"

Ye Tian roughly judged the cultivation of the Changfeng Dao Ancestor, and this kind of cultivation was much stronger than the Changbai Dao Ancestor, the Void White Dao Ancestor, and so on.

After all, the Sixfold Ancestor, every time he ascends to a small realm, it is a huge improvement.

"Half-step Sixfold Ancestor!"

Changfeng Dao Ancestor glanced at Ye Tian, and there was a trace of contempt in his heart, he thought that it was a certain six-fold ancestor who asked for a deal with him and asked for a Zhenyu stone for his juniors, but he didn't expect it to be a half-step six-fold ancestor who asked for it himself.

Such a half-step six-fold ancestor, what good things can he trade with?

"Boy, you want my Zhenyu Stone, what treasures can you come up with? Let's make it clear first, the value of Zhenyu Stone is very precious, and I can't look down on ordinary treasures!"

Changfeng Daozu said.

"Changfeng Dao Ancestor, this is the Zilin Flowing Liquid, which can improve the cultivation of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, and in terms of value, it should be comparable to the Zhenyu Stone!" Ye Tian took out a Purple Lin Flowing Liquid, which was a treasure from the Qinglong Dao Ancestor.

Changfeng Dao Ancestor glanced at the Zilin River Basin and chuckled: "The Zilin Liquid is indeed okay, but I am already in the middle stage of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, and it will not help me much. So, I don't need this thing!"

Ye Tian's face changed, the Changfeng Dao Ancestor didn't even need the Zilin Flowing Liquid, so the other treasures definitely didn't need either, the Qinglong Dao Ancestor was originally a very weak Sixfold Origin Ancestor, and except for the Dao Void True Tree, the value of other things on his body was average.

"If you don't have good things, then don't waste your time!"

Changfeng Dao Ancestor was about to leave as he spoke.

At this time, Ye Tian hurriedly said: "I have a treasure, and even a little help to the peak powerhouse of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, it should be enough to exchange for the Zhenyu Stone!"

"What's that?"

Changfeng Daozu asked.

"Daokong True Tree Fragment!" Ye Tian revealed, "Of course, it's a very small fragment!"

"Daokong True Tree Fragment !!"

Changfeng Daozu was shocked, this is a really good thing!

There is still such a good thing in a half-step sixfold ancestor?

"Take it out and take a look?"

Changfeng Daozu asked.

Ye Tian smiled and said, "I can take it out, but Changfeng Dao Ancestor, you also have to take out the Zhenyu Stone, show it to me!"

"Yes!"

Changfeng Daozu agreed, but he was a little angry in his heart.

Soon.

Changfeng Dao Ancestor took out the Zhenyu Stone, and Ye Tian also came out with the fragments of the Daokong True Tree.

Ye Tian didn't take out all the branches of the Daokong True Tree, this branch was a treasure that could make a large number of Sixfold Ancestors fight desperately, and the town stones could not be exchanged for these, so he only intercepted the fragments of the Daokong True Tree with the length of his fingers.

"Sure enough, it's a fragment of the Daokong True Tree, but it's a pity that there is only so little!"

Changfeng Dao Ancestor regretted it.

"Changfeng Dao Ancestor, are you willing to trade?" Ye Tian asked.

"Can be traded!"

Changfeng Daozu agreed.

Immediately, Ye Tian traded with Changfeng Dao Ancestor.

After Ye Tian left with the Zhenyu Stone, Changfeng Dao Ancestor showed a strange smile on his face, "Only intercept a small fragment of the Daokong True Tree, think I can't see it, this little guy must still have a lot of Daokong True Tree fragments, but it can't be a complete Daokong True Tree." But even so, if I get it, it will help me a lot. Even if I don't need it now, if I trade it, I can exchange it for a lot of resources!"

However, he didn't immediately make a move against Ye Tian, so this was Julu City, even he didn't dare to disobey the orders of the three Sixfold Origin Ancestor peak powerhouses.

After Ye Tian left Julu City, he would intercept and kill Ye Tian again.

Of course, he had to inquire if there was a sixfold ancestor behind Ye Tian, and even if there were, if there were a lot, he would make a move.
